notes: NRE reproduced via simulation. The bug occurs when ActualWidth/ActualHeight are positive but small enough that (int)(value * dpi) rounds to 0. The DoInvalidate guard (ActualWidth <= 0) passes, but CreateBitmap produces a 0-pixel SKImageInfo. Since info.Width > 0 is false, bitmap is not recreated after FreeBitmap nullifies it, causing NRE at line 72 (bitmap.PixelBuffer.AsStream()). The code is identical across 3.116.0, 3.119.2, and main. The WinUI version does not have this issue.

reproductionSteps.description: Create console simulation project extracting CreateBitmap/FreeBitmap/DoInvalidate logic from SKXamlCanvas.Skia.cs
reproductionSteps.command: mkdir -p /tmp/skiasharp/repro/3430 && cd /tmp/skiasharp/repro/3430 && dotnet new console -n Repro --framework net8.0

filesCreated.description: Simulation of SKXamlCanvas.Skia.cs logic — extracts CreateBitmap, FreeBitmap, DoInvalidate, and CreateSize methods into a standalone console app with 6 test scenarios covering normal resize, sub-pixel dimensions, and high DPI

reproductionSteps.description: Run simulation — reproduces NRE in 5 of 6 scenarios when pixel dimensions round to 0
reproductionSteps.output:
=== SKXamlCanvas NRE Reproduction (Issue #3430) ===
Simulating CreateBitmap/FreeBitmap logic from SKXamlCanvas.Skia.cs

--- Test 1: Normal resize (100x100 -> 200x200) ---
  RESULT: OK — no NRE

--- Test 2: Resize to sub-pixel width (100x100 -> 0.5x100, dpi=1.0) ---
  After CreateBitmap: info=(0x100), bitmap=NULL
  RESULT: NRE — bitmap is null at line 72! pixelWidth=0, pixelHeight=100

--- Test 3: Resize to sub-pixel height (100x100 -> 100x0.3, dpi=1.0) ---
  After CreateBitmap: info=(100x0), bitmap=NULL
  RESULT: NRE — bitmap is null at line 72! pixelWidth=100, pixelHeight=0

--- Test 4: Both sub-pixel (100x100 -> 0.5x0.5, dpi=1.0) ---
  RESULT: NRE — bitmap is null at line 72!

--- Test 5: High DPI (100x100 -> 0.3x100, dpi=2.0) ---
  RESULT: NRE — bitmap is null at line 72!

--- Test 6: First render sub-pixel (0.5x100, dpi=1.0) ---
  RESULT: NRE — bitmap is null at line 72!

=== Summary ===
Total tests: 6
NRE triggered: 5/6
FAILURE: NullReferenceException reproduced in 5 of 6 scenarios

versionResults.notes: NRE reproduced via simulation — 5/6 test scenarios trigger NullReferenceException when pixel dimensions round to 0
Source code identical to 3.116.0 (git log confirms no changes to file). Same logic bug present.
Source code on main is identical — git diff shows no changes. Bug persists on main.

corrections.upstream: Double FreeBitmap() at line 106 nullifies bitmap just created during standard resize
corrections.corrected: The second FreeBitmap() at line 106 is a no-op during standard resize (pixels already null). The real trigger is sub-pixel dimensions where ActualWidth > 0 passes DoInvalidate guard but (int)(ActualWidth * dpi) == 0 causes CreateBitmap to skip bitmap creation.

proposedResponse.body:
Thanks for the report @MartinZikmund — confirmed.

We reproduced the NRE by simulating the `CreateBitmap`/`FreeBitmap` logic. The root cause is a guard mismatch:

- `DoInvalidate()` checks `ActualWidth <= 0 || ActualHeight <= 0` (line 45)
- `CreateBitmap()` checks `info.Width > 0 && info.Height > 0` (line 89) where `info.Width = (int)(ActualWidth * dpi)`

When `ActualWidth` is positive but small enough that `(int)(ActualWidth * dpi)` rounds to 0 (e.g., during window resize animations), the DoInvalidate guard passes but bitmap is never created, causing the NRE at line 72.

**Tested versions:**
| Version | Result |
|---------|--------|
| 3.116.0 (reporter) | ❌ Reproduced |
| 3.119.2 (latest) | ❌ Reproduced |
| main | ❌ Reproduced |

NRE triggered in 5/6 test scenarios (sub-pixel width, height, both, high DPI, and first render). Normal integer resizes work correctly.

**Workaround:** Set `MinWidth="1" MinHeight="1"` on `SKXamlCanvas` to prevent sub-pixel dimensions.

actionability.reason: Bug reproduced on all versions including main. Root cause is clear: guard mismatch between DoInvalidate (checks ActualWidth) and CreateBitmap (checks pixel dimensions). Fix needed.

workarounds: Set MinWidth="1" MinHeight="1" on SKXamlCanvas to prevent sub-pixel dimensions

actions.description: Add os/Linux label — bug affects all Uno Skia backends
